comments: Tommy states that session band The Enid are on stage at the Marquee in the introduction.
Second half of the show is a repeat of the AC/DC 1977 live at Atlantic Studios set (Part One). Part Two TX 01 April 1983.
The uploader (Stan Ward) has a dedication read out after the Starfighters track (at around 19m25s).

sessions.artist: Enid - First broadcast of session recorded 4/2/1983
sessions.details: Robert John Godfrey (vocals, keyboard), Chris North (drums), Steven Stewart (guitar). Not commercially available

sessions.artist: AC/DC - Recorded 1977-12-07 at the Atlantic Recording Studios in New York

Here's Looking At You (LP - In Flight Movie) Jive
